title: Search with No Results
precondition: User is on the Master Campaign List Page. No master campaign name contains the term "ZebraXylofon123".
steps: User focuses on the Search Bar.
User types "ZebraXylofon123" into the Search Bar.
User waits for the search to trigger (auto or presses Enter).
expected_result: The Master Campaign List Table updates to show no data rows.
An empty state message is shown, e.g., "No results found matching your search."
The search keyword remains displayed so the user understands which term produced no results.
